New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API

Your browser does not support the audio element. Listen to article This content is generated by Google AI. Generative AI is experimental [[duration]] minutes Voice Speed 0.75X 1X 1.5X 2X

Today, we are adding Flex and Priority inference to the Gemini API so developers can choose between lower cost experimentation and higher reliability production traffic through a single interface.

Google says these tiers are intended to help teams manage real operational tradeoffs, especially once AI features move from demos into workflows with latency, budget, and uptime expectations.

The update also gives platform teams a cleaner way to separate prototyping traffic from business-critical usage without rebuilding their integration around a different endpoint.

POSTED IN: Developer tools AI
